Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured list of the key topics covered in this module on functions, comprehensions, and functional patterns, used by instructors to organize content and by learners to preview what they will study.

Artifacts.Name: Interactive HTML
Artifacts.Description: An interactive webpage presenting core instructional content on functions, comprehensions, or functional patterns, allowing learners to engage with explanations and embedded exercises directly in the browser.

Artifacts.Name: HTML Document
Artifacts.Description: A static webpage delivering reading-based instructional content on a concept within the module, intended for learners to read through explanations, examples, or reference material.

Artifacts.Name: Interactive HTML
Artifacts.Description: An interactive webpage that combines instructional content with hands-on elements such as code examples or inline quizzes, enabling learners to actively explore a specific topic in the module.

Artifacts.Name: Interactive HTML
Artifacts.Description: An interactive webpage offering another focused lesson or practice opportunity on a module concept, allowing learners to engage with content and receive immediate feedback.

Artifacts.Name: Interactive HTML
Artifacts.Description: An interactive webpage presenting additional instructional content with interactive components, supporting learners in practicing or exploring another aspect of functions, comprehensions, or functional patterns.

Artifacts.Name: HTML Document
Artifacts.Description: A static webpage providing supplementary or reference reading on a module topic, intended for learners to study explanations or worked examples without interactive elements.

Artifacts.Name: Base Case or Recursive Case?
Artifacts.Description: A drag-and-drop or classification activity where learners identify whether a given case in a recursive function is a base case or a recursive case, reinforcing understanding of recursion fundamentals.

Artifacts.Name: External Materials Index
Artifacts.Description: A curated index of outside resources such as documentation, readings, or videos related to the module topics, used by learners and instructors to access supplementary external learning materials.
